arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Mateusz Klich wants ‘going up party’
arts.sum: Four points are needed for promotion from Leeds’ final three games, and with Sheffield United heading to Burnley in the evening, there’s every chance that Leeds may only need to get their job done today. Leeds United’s home clash against Stoke City today could be the fixture in which the Whites move within a point of automatic promotion, should all go to plan they could be promoted later in the evening too.

arts.ttl: Leeds set to do something generational at Elland Road for first time in 35 years
arts.sum: Sheffield United play Stoke away from home the Friday prior to Leeds' clash with Bristol City, meaning there are two chances for it all to be over by the time the Whites play next. Elland Road is set to boast a special atmosphere on Easter Monday, with Leeds United on the precipice of automatic promotion.

arts.ttl: I won promotion with Leeds United - this is how players will feel upon going up
arts.sum: Former Leeds United captain Liam Cooper has described how he felt “relief” and “excitement” upon earning promotion to the Premier League in 2020, and hopes the current Whites players can soon experience the same emotions. Cooper and Bielsa will go down in the annals of Leeds United history as being the talismen who led the Whites back to the promised land after a 16-year exile.

arts.ttl: Leicester City among clubs considering Leeds United goalkeeper swoop
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier has interest from Leicester City as a potential Mads Hermansen replacement, according to… The post Leicester City among clubs considering Leeds United goalkeeper swoop appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Stoke City stalwart confirms injury update after being stretchered off
arts.sum: There had been interest at that time from AIK Stockholm but he wanted to try to earn a new deal at Stoke. Jordan Thompson has confirmed his season is over after being stretchered off during Stoke City's Good Friday win over Sheffield Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Leicester City’s Leeds United taunts officially backfire, brutal EFL response could follow
arts.sum: Last year, Leicester were found in breach of the Premier League’s PSR threshold for 22/23, but jurisdiction loopholes meant they could not be punished as they were a Championship side at the time. Leicester City, then Ipswich Town, then Southampton all took turns to gloat at Leeds’ expense, only to head into the Premier League and become whipping boys for a year.

arts.ttl: “Good contact with Leeds” – Player reveals offer from England, Whites project key for transfer decision
arts.sum: Royal Antwerp goalkeeper Senne Lammens ruled out a move to Leeds United earlier in his career. Het Nieuwsblad have been speaking to the 22-year-old on several topics, and he spoke about Leeds United’s approach. The Whites were among the clubs to have shown interest in the stopper but weren’t able to secure his services. Lammens The post “Good contact with Leeds” – Player reveals offer from England, Whites project key for transfer decision appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds lining up record-breaking promotion feat as Scott Parker asked for favour
arts.sum: If both Leeds and Sheffield United win, and the Blades go on to beat Stoke themselves on Friday, Farke’s men can secure promotion with a point against Bristol City thanks to their almighty goal difference. Leeds United supporters are looking ahead to what might be but Daniel Farke is attempting to keep his players grounded ahead of Monday.

arts.ttl: Monday's Championship predictions including Leeds United vs. Stoke City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Stoke City.

arts.ttl: EFL Preview: Burnley and Leeds hope to clinch promotion
arts.sum: The second part of an Easter weekend double bill could answer a few big questions, with both Burnley and Leeds hoping to book Premier League returns.
